title: Muse Joseph Tortoise Prescription Sunglasses - 50% Off Lenses
description: Frame is of high quality and was tough enough to survive my getting them adjusted. I have a significant prescription and the price for lenses was significantly below Warby Parker!

It is a good value and true to advertisement. The frame is good, however, what I did not foresee was that the little bolts on the lenses, which attach the nose pieces will take some time to get used to because they somehow are visible. It is something you really can't notice without trying on. I got prescription lenses and they are pretty thick even though I picket the recommended best value middle option. I would go with the finest option next time. I am comparing the lens thickness with that of my prescription everyday transition lenses from my optometrist and they are more than 2x thicker. So, at the end of the day you get what you pay for. Having said that I have no regrets and may buy again from this site in the future.
